email.welcome_body: Your account has been created on {{organisation}}. Click the button below to set your password and activate your account.
email.expiry_notice: This link will expire in {{setupTokenExpiryHours}} hours. If you did not expect this email, please contact your administrator.
email.reset_otp_body: We received a request to reset your password. Use the OTP below to proceed.
email.reset_success_body: Hi {{fullName}}, your password has been reset successfully.
email.password_set_body: Hi {{fullName}}, your password has been set and your account is now active. You can sign in any time.
email.password_changed_body: Hi {{fullName}}, your account password was changed.
email.not_you_otp_body: If you didn't request a password reset, you can safely ignore this email — your password stays the same. Do not share this OTP with anyone.
email.not_you_success_body: If you did not perform this action, your account may be compromised. Contact your administrator immediately.
email.support_contact: Questions? Reach us at {{supportEmail}}.
